Notes: UWP sends game to overtime on Heckert's 3-point basket with :00.2 left in
regulation...UWP trailed 56-52 with 18 seconds left in regulation...Tied at
59, UWP ended overtime with 10-6 run...UWP got 14 points and 12 rebounds from
Domask while UWO got 15 points and 10 rebounds from Porath.
Game.Officials: Abby Burmeister,  Austin Edge,  Ron Quirk
